items.x: Edit any project after creation — a pencil button in Settings → Projects opens a full editor for name, emoji, and color; "Change color…" also joins the right-click menu in the focus picker.
Menu bar pill styles — Project color, Monochrome, or High contrast (Settings → Chip).
A "Join the Beta on Telegram" invite in the popovers and picker — subtle shimmer, dismissible forever with its ✕, always findable again in Settings.
The floating pill is now called the Chip, with its own explained section in Settings.
A single Settings window with a sidebar (Goals · Focus · Projects · Pill · Connections · Log · Data · Updates) — replaces the old Preferences tabs and "Settings + Log".
"End an idle session after" setting (2 / 3 / 10 / 30 min, default 3).
Reassign a session's project when editing it in the Log.
Join the beta on Telegram — a link in the menu-bar popover and a subtle one at the bottom of the focus picker, straight into the testers group.
A single Settings window with a sidebar (Goals · Focus · Projects · Pill · Connections · Log · Data · Updates) — replaces both the old Preferences tabs and "Settings + Log".
"End an idle session after" setting (2 / 3 / 10 / 30 min, default 3) — how long with no keyboard/mouse before DeepTime ends the session and re-asks what you're focusing on.
Reassign a session's project when editing it in the Log (alongside start/end times).
The pill position sliders and screen picker (the pill is drag-to-move on the main display now).
Edit a session's start & end times in the Log — click the pencil on any completed session (or right-click → "Edit start & end…").
The movable pill stays strictly on the primary display again — it can no longer be dragged onto (or stranded on) a secondary monitor.
